title: psidium minutiflorum
intro: Psidium minutiflorum, also known as the dwarf strawberry guava, is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family, Myrtaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psidium minutiflorum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
